hero.subtitle: BarberBook gives your shop an online booking page, automated SMS reminders, and a dashboard that shows you exactly what's happening every day.

problem.title: Sound familiar?
problem.subtitle: Running a barbershop is hard enough without these headaches.
problem.p1Desc: Clients call, you're mid-haircut. You call back, they don't answer. You lose the booking.
problem.p2Desc: A no-show at $35 isn't just $35 gone — it's 30 minutes you can never get back.
problem.p3Desc: Paper books and DMs don't sync. Two clients arriving at the same time is embarrassing.

features.title: Everything your shop needs
features.subtitle: One tool that handles bookings, reminders, team management, and analytics.
features.f1Desc: Clients book from your link 24/7. Works perfectly on mobile.
features.f2Desc: Automated reminders 24h before every appointment. Cut no-shows by 60%.
features.f3Desc: See your day at a glance. Manage appointments, clients, and income.
features.f4Desc: Manage your whole team with individual schedules and availability.
features.f5Desc: Handle walk-ins alongside online bookings without double-booking.
features.f6Desc: Track income, top services, and busiest hours with clear reports.

pricing.title: Simple, honest pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Scale as you grow. Cancel anytime.

testimonials.title: Barbers love BarberBook
testimonials.subtitle: Real shops, real results.
testimonials.t1Quote: I used to lose 3–4 appointments a week to no-shows. Since switching to BarberBook the reminders have cut that almost to zero. My revenue is up $800 a month.
testimonials.t2Quote: My clients love being able to book from Instagram at midnight. I wake up with a full schedule. Setup took 10 minutes — worth every penny.
testimonials.t3Quote: We have 6 barbers and managing everyone's schedule was a nightmare. BarberBook's team dashboard is exactly what we needed. Clean, fast, no confusion.

cta.title: Ready to fill your chair?
cta.subtitle: Join 1,000+ barbers who stopped losing money to no-shows.
